title: Star Wars (comic strip)
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}}
{{Otheruses|Star Wars}}
[[File:Kashyyyk_Depths_title.jpg|thumb|250px|Title from ''[[The Kashyyyk Depths]]'']]
'''''Star Wars''''' was a comic strip published in newspapers from [[1979]] to [[1984]] and distributed by the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]] and the [[Watertown Daily Times]].

The ''[[Star Wars Scrapbook]]'' is a department of the comic strip.

==History {{SectionFlag}}==
The strip was [[Star Wars (planned comic strip)|originally planned]] to be written and drawn by [[Al Williamson]], but after working on it for two weeks, the work was scrapped. [[Russ Manning]] wrote and drew the published strip until poor health forced him to retire from it. [[Russ Helm]] took over writing duties with ''[[Princess Leia, Imperial Servant]]'', followed later by [[Archie Goodwin]] with an [[Han Solo at Stars' End (comic strip)|adaptation]] of the novel ''[[Han Solo at Stars' End]]''. Williamson joined Goodwin for the next story, ''[[The Bounty Hunter of Ord Mantell]]'', and their partnership continued until the final strip, published in [[1984]].

As the strip was being published, [[The Official Star Wars Comic Strip Contest|The Official ''Star Wars'' Comic Strip Contest]] was held, with a deadline of Halloween 1979. The first five story arcs were among the few works licensed by the short-lived [[Lucasfilm]] subsidiary [[Black Falcon]].

Among the newspapers the Los Angeles Times Syndicate distributed the comic to was [[Wikipedia:Singapore|Singapore's]] [[Wikipedia:The Straits Times|''The Straits Times'']].<ref name="TST 1983">{{BookCite|author=Williamson, Al; Goodwin, Archie|container=Star Wars|title=[[Wikipedia:The Straits Times|''The Straits Times'']]|date=1983-05-26|pages=p. 12|link=https://eresources.nlb.gov.sg/newspapers/digitised/article/straitstimes19830526-1.2.135.1}}</ref>

===Reprints===
Decades later, [[Dark Horse Comics]] edited, colored, and reprinted most of these stories in two comic-book series: Goodwin and Williamson's strips in ''[[Classic Star Wars]]'', and Helm and Manning's in ''[[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures]]''. These comics did not include ''[[Planet of Kadril]]'' or the Sunday strips. Later, ''Han Solo at Stars' End'' was reprinted under the ''Classic Star Wars'' title, as was the Sunday strip ''[[The Constancia Affair]]''.

In [[2005]], [[StarWars.com]]'s [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] began [[Star Wars comic books|publishing]] the newspaper strips alongside all-new stories. All of Manning's daily strips were included, as were most of Goodwin's.

According to the ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine's [[Star Wars Insider Special Edition 2012|Special Edition 2012]] article "[[The Empire Strips Back]]," Dark Horse Comics planned to collect and anthologize these comics.

The comic strips later got anthologized in the form of the [[Epic Collection]] (which dealt with the comic-book reprints) as well as three hardcover volumes by [[IDW Publishing]].

==Contents==
*"[[The Constancia Affair]]", by Russ Manning (Reprinted as ''[[Star Wars Special: The Constancia Affair]]'')
*"[[Gambler's World]]", by Russ Manning (Reprinted in [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 1|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 1]], [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 2|2]], and [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 3|3]])
*"[[The Kashyyyk Depths]]", by Russ Manning (The only strip not reprinted in a non-collection)
*"[[Tatooine Sojourn]]", by Russ Manning and Steve Gerber (Reprinted in [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 4|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 4]])
*"[[Princess Leia, Imperial Servant]]", by Russ Helm and Russ Manning (Reprinted in [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 5|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 5]])
*"[[The Second Kessel Run]]", by Russ Helm and Russ Manning (Reprinted in [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 6|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 6]])
*"[[Bring Me the Children]]", by Russ Manning (Reprinted in [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 7|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 7]])
*"[[As Long As We Live...]]", by Russ Manning (Reprinted in [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 8|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 8]])
*"[[The Frozen World of Ota]]", by Russ Manning (Reprinted in [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 9|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 9]])
*"[[Planet of Kadril]]", by Russ Helm and Alfredo Alcala (Reprinted as a webstrip on [[StarWars.com]])
*[[Han Solo at Stars' End (comic strip)|''Han Solo at Stars' End'']], by [[Brian Daley]], adapted by Archie Goodwin and Alfredo Alcala (Reprinted as ''[[Classic Star Wars: Han Solo at Stars' End]]'')
*"[[The Bounty Hunter of Ord Mantell]]", by Archie Goodwin and Al Williamson (Reprinted as [[Classic Star Wars 1|''Classic Star Wars'' 1]] and [[Classic Star Wars 2|2]])
*"[[Darth Vader Strikes]]", by Archie Goodwin and Al Williamson (Reprinted in [[Classic Star Wars 2|''Classic Star Wars'' 2]], [[Classic Star Wars 3|3]], and [[Classic Star Wars 4|4]])
*"[[The Serpent Masters]]", by Archie Goodwin and Al Williamson (Reprinted in [[Classic Star Wars 4|''Classic Star Wars'' 4]], [[Classic Star Wars 5|5]], and [[Classic Star Wars 6|6]])
*"[[Deadly Reunion]]", by Archie Goodwin and Al Williamson (Reprinted in [[Classic Star Wars 6|''Classic Star Wars'' 6]] and [[Classic Star Wars 7|7]])
*"[[Traitor's Gambit]]", by Archie Goodwin and Al Williamson (Reprinted in [[Classic Star Wars 7|''Classic Star Wars'' 7]] and [[Classic Star Wars 8|8]])
*"[[The Night Beast]]", by Archie Goodwin and Al Williamson (Reprinted in [[Classic Star Wars 8|''Classic Star Wars'' 8]], [[Classic Star Wars 9|9]], and [[Classic Star Wars 10|10]])
*"[[The Return of Ben Kenobi]]", by Archie Goodwin and Al Williamson (Reprinted in [[Classic Star Wars 10|''Classic Star Wars'' 10]] and [[Classic Star Wars 11|11]])
*"[[The Power Gem]]", by Archie Goodwin and Al Williamson (Reprinted in [[Classic Star Wars 11|''Classic Star Wars'' 11]] and [[Classic Star Wars 12|12]])
*"[[Iceworld]]", by Archie Goodwin and Al Williamson (Reprinted in [[Classic Star Wars 12|''Classic Star Wars'' 12]] and [[Classic Star Wars 13|13]])
*"[[It's a Trap]]", by Archie Goodwin and Al Williamson (Reprinted in [[Classic Star Wars 13|''Classic Star Wars'' 13]] and [[Classic Star Wars 14|14]])
*"[[Doom Mission]]", by Archie Goodwin and Al Williamson (Reprinted in [[Classic Star Wars 14|''Classic Star Wars'' 14]] and [[Classic Star Wars 15|15]])
*"[[Race for Survival]]", by Archie Goodwin and Al Williamson (Reprinted in [[Classic Star Wars 16|''Classic Star Wars'' 16]] and [[Classic Star Wars 17|17]])
*"[[The Paradise Detour]]", by Archie Goodwin and Al Williamson (Reprinted in [[Classic Star Wars 17|''Classic Star Wars'' 17]] and [[Classic Star Wars 18|18]])
*"[[A New Beginning]]", by Archie Goodwin and Al Williamson (Reprinted in [[Classic Star Wars 18|''Classic Star Wars'' 18]], [[Classic Star Wars 19|19]], and [[Classic Star Wars 20|20]])
*"[[Showdown (LA Times)|Showdown]]", by Archie Goodwin and Al Williamson (Reprinted in [[Classic Star Wars 20|''Classic Star Wars'' 20]])
*"[[The Final Trap]]", by Archie Goodwin and Al Williamson (Reprinted in [[Classic Star Wars 20|''Classic Star Wars'' 20]])
